College of Education et Albany Prank G. Gayrino HO 361254 Ex. 73 Innediate

Sopt,20,Albany <= Dr, Walter B, Keighton, Chaiman ef the Department of Chenistry at Svartimore College, Svarthmore, Pennsylvania, will lecture on "Honore Seminars in Chonierty", at the College of Education in Albany, on Thumeday, September 21, at 4100 F.!., in room 150 Husted Hall, according to an announcement by Dr, Donald &. Allen, Chairman of the Department of Chonistry at the College.

Adniniotraters and faculty of the area colleges are cordially invited to attend Dr. Keighton's séminar lecture,

Swarthmore College has been one of the nation's leading institutions in developing “honors' programe" for gifted students,

+409
